name: Adecco Group AG
lede: Adecco runs two capability centers in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering it and ssc, built over 27 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Adecco office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Adecco Group AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Adecco runs 2 verified GCC centers in Bengaluru, covering it and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Adecco's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning it and ssc. The centers deliver IT and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all fourteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Adecco operate in India?
faq.a: Adecco operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Adecco have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Adecco's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Adecco run in India?
faq.a: Adecco runs it and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Adecco's India GCCs?
faq.a: Adecco's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Adecco's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 14 leaders at Adecco's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
